response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his resume overstates seniority, lacks clear evidence of relational database (PostgreSQL) usage, and shows no demonstrated experience in renewable energy or construction tech; his heavy focus on DLang and embedded systems raises questions about relevance, and German language deficiency conflicts with high on-site presence in Germany.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from frontend to infrastructure (Docker, CI/CD, AWS)
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching experience
concerns: No explicit PostgreSQL or relational database experience listed
Dominance of DLang and non-relevant embedded projects may indicate misalignment
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
